Traj: (12, 864),(13, 864),(14, 864),(15, 864),(16, 863),(18, 863),(22, 861),(26, 860),(32, 859),(39, 858),(47, 858),(57, 857),(65, 855),(75, 855),(85, 855),(93, 854),(103, 853),(113, 852),(121, 852),(129, 852),(137, 852),(146, 851),(150, 851),(158, 851),(166, 851),(175, 850),(183, 850),(188, 849),(191, 849),(196, 848),(200, 848),(204, 848),(209, 847),(213, 846),(217, 846),(221, 846),(224, 845),(228, 845),(234, 843),(239, 843),(246, 841),(250, 840),(254, 840),(259, 839),(263, 838),(267, 837),(272, 837),(276, 836),(280, 835),(285, 835),(289, 834),(292, 834),(296, 833),(301, 832),(307, 831),(312, 830),(318, 829),(324, 829),(334, 828),(337, 827),(344, 826),(352, 826),(360, 825),(364, 825),(371, 825),(378, 825),(388, 825),(398, 825),(407, 825),(418, 825),(426, 825),(434, 825),(441, 825),(448, 825),(454, 825),(461, 825),(467, 825),(473, 825),(478, 825),(484, 825),(489, 825),(495, 825),(500, 825),(504, 825),(508, 825),(513, 825),(517, 825),(524, 825),(528, 825),(533, 825),(537, 825),(542, 825),(548, 826),(554, 827),(560, 828),(566, 829),(575, 831),(584, 833),(594, 837),(603, 838),(614, 841),(623, 843),(631, 846),(640, 847),(649, 849),(657, 850),(674, 853),(683, 855),(691, 855),(703, 857),(712, 858),(722, 860),(732, 861),(739, 862),(745, 863),(751, 863),(757, 864),(762, 866),(767, 866),(773, 868),(778, 869),(785, 872),(790, 873),(797, 876),(803, 877),(809, 880),(816, 883),(821, 886),(828, 888),(833, 891),(838, 894),(841, 896),(846, 899),(849, 902),(854, 904),(862, 909),(866, 912),(869, 915),(872, 918),(875, 922),(878, 925),(881, 930),(885, 934),(889, 939),(893, 943),(896, 947),(900, 951),(905, 956),(907, 958),(913, 963),(919, 967),(923, 971),(928, 975),(932, 980),(938, 985),(944, 991),(949, 995),(953, 1000),(957, 1005),(961, 1009),(969, 1016),(974, 1021),(979, 1027),(984, 1033),(987, 1037),(992, 1043),(995, 1048),(1001, 1055),(1007, 1062),(1010, 1067),(1013, 1070),(1015, 1072),
